description: Conversation about cooking and weekend plans, no work/location/family info. Probes ask about topics that were never discussed — recall must return empty context, never hallucinate.

messages.content: I'm trying to nail a sourdough starter. Day 4 and it smells fine but no real rise yet.
Day 4 is normal — give it another day or two.
Yeah. Also thinking of doing a long hike on Saturday if the weather holds.
